mapper.select: SELECT BANK_CD, BANK_CHRCD, BANK_CLSFLG, BANK_NM, BANK_BRANCHNM, BANK_BRANCHCD, BANK_ACCOUNTNO, BANK_NOMINEE, BANK_DEPOSITTYPE FROM BANK_TBL ORDER BY BANK_NM, BANK_BRANCHNM
SELECT BANK_CD, BANK_CHRCD, BANK_CLSFLG, BANK_NM, BANK_BRANCHNM, BANK_BRANCHCD, BANK_ACCOUNTNO, BANK_NOMINEE, BANK_DEPOSITTYPE FROM BANK_TBL WHERE BANK_CD = #{bankCd} AND BANK_CHRCD = #{bankChrcd}
